ItacPersonItem.PersonalTitle: Secretary of the Council of Ten (Venice)
ItacPersonItem.Notes: A portrait of Leonardo Ottoboni is in Tomasini, Elogia virorum (1644). For his dates, see Cicogna, Delle iscrizioni veneziane, vol. 5 (1842).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
